title: ervum tenoreanum
intro: Ervum tenoreanum, also known as the horse bean or ervum bean, is a type of legume that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ervum tenoreanum include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ervum tenoreanum include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be taken to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
